extensions.description: Extension to see diff while working with CLI AI (Claude Code, Codex, etc.)

extensions.name: claude-linkedin-assistant
extensions.description: Minimal Claude Code workspace for tracking jobs + sending first-DM LinkedIn outreach via the Claude in Chrome extension. Tracker CRUD, job discovery, and 1st-degree-only outreach. Reply handling, follow-ups, and applications stay manual.

extensions.name: ClaudeCodeUsage
extensions.description: A VSCode extension that monitors Claude Code usage and costs directly in your status bar.

extensions.name: Codaware
extensions.description: Chrome Extension that turns ChatGPT and Claude into Cursor Composer

extensions.name: claude-for-safari
extensions.description: Give your AI Agent the power to control Safari on macOS. No extensions, no separate browser.

extensions.name: Panelize
extensions.description: Compare ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Doubao, DeepSeek and more side by side in one Chrome extension.

extensions.name: chatmark
extensions.description: Chrome extension to organize and tag your AI chat conversations from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Mistral in one central hub.

extensions.name: mcp-link
extensions.description: Let AI agents like ChatGPT & Claude use real-world local/remote tools you approve via browser extension + optional MCP server

extensions.name: saypi-userscript
extensions.description: Enterprise-grade browser extension bringing multilingual voice interaction to AI chatbots (Pi, Claude, ChatGPT). Features real-time speech detection with Silero VAD, accurate transcription via OpenAI Whisper, and ElevenLabs TTS. Built with TypeScript, XState, and modern web standards. Progressive enhancement across Chrome, Firefox, and Safari

extensions.name: claude-code-monitor
extensions.description: Raycast extension for real-time Claude Code session monitoring with hooks-based state tracking

extensions.name: ipyai
extensions.description: A terminal IPython extension that adds Claude and Codex powered prompting

extensions.name: GPT2Claude-Migration-Kit
extensions.description: Export everything from ChatGPT (memories, conversations, instructions) and migrate to Claude. No extensions, no install — just paste and run.

extensions.name: Blender-Extension
extensions.description: Blender LLM Assistant turns natural language into 3D creations instantly. Type commands like "create a red cube" and watch AI-generated Python run in real time. Supports OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini with secure validation a perfect for rapid prototyping, learning bpy, and automating workflows.
